name: VOLT Sleep — Performance Tracker
notes: Runs daily at 08:00 UTC. Pulls metrics from platform APIs, stores in content_performance, identifies top hooks, and updates hook weights automatically.

nodes.name: Fetch TikTok Metrics
nodes.notes: Requires TikTok Research API or Content Posting API with video.list scope.

nodes.name: Fetch YouTube Metrics
nodes.notes: Uses YouTube Data API v3. No OAuth needed for public video stats.
